title: dysoxylum flavescens
intro: Dysoxylum flavescens, also known as yellow dysoxylum, is a plant species belonging to the family Meliaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Dysoxylum flavescens include the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Dysoxylum flavescens can be prepared in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties for therapeutic purposes.
